name: distortionz_notify
changelog: v1.0.4 — Added README.md with overview, features, dependencies, installation, API reference, and credits. Standardized GitHub repo metadata (badges, dynamic version pull, MIT license, Qbox required). v1.0.3 — Standardized version checker format. Premium custom notification system with config support, custom status sounds (success/error/warning/info/cash/police), premium NUI, and server-side notify API.
